A

addEdge(Integer, Edge<T>, T, T) - Method in class Graph
Adds a new edge to graph using its key (it must be a free edge's number), object link and keys of incident vertexes.
addVertex(T) - Method in class Graph
Creates a new vertex by its value and adds it to graph.
addVertex(Vertex<T>) - Method in class Graph
Adds a new vertex to graph by its object link.
addWay(Edge<T>) - Method in class Vertex
Adds a new edge to the list of incident edges.

C

compareTo(T) - Method in class Graph
 

D

deykstraAlgorithm(Vertex<T>) - Method in class Graph
Deykstra algorithm for searching shortest ways from start vertex to others.

E

Edge<T> - Class in <Unnamed>
Class Edge for storing ways in graph.
Edge(int) - Constructor for class Edge
Constructor to create an edge when we know only weight.
Edge(int, Vertex<T>, Vertex<T>) - Constructor for class Edge
Constructor to create an edge as its weight and incident vertexes.
edgesArray - Variable in class Graph
 
equals(Object) - Method in class Vertex
 

G

getColor() - Method in class Vertex
Vertex's color getter.
getFrom() - Method in class Edge
From getter.
getShortestWay() - Method in class Vertex
Vertex's shortest way getter.
getTo() - Method in class Edge
To getter.
getValue() - Method in class Vertex
Vertex's value getter.
getWays() - Method in class Vertex
List of incident edges getter.
getWeight() - Method in class Edge
Weight getter.
Graph<T> - Class in <Unnamed>
Generic class Graph which support three methods of initialisation and can be sorted by DeykstraAlgorithm.
Graph(List<Vertex<T>>) - Constructor for class Graph
Graph constructor which works with a List of Vertexes (each vertex has to know it's FROM edges).
Graph(T[], int[][]) - Constructor for class Graph
Graph constructor which works with a way's matrix.
Graph(T[], int[], int[][]) - Constructor for class Graph
Graph constructor which works with an incident matrix.

H

hashCode() - Method in class Vertex
 

R

removeEdge(Edge<T>) - Method in class Graph
Removes an edge by object link.
removeEdge(T) - Method in class Graph
Removes an edge by key.
removeVertex(T) - Method in class Graph
Removes vertex from graph by its key and removes it's TO edges from other's vertexes ways lists.

S

setColor(boolean) - Method in class Vertex
Vertex's color setter.
setFrom(Vertex<T>) - Method in class Edge
Changes a FROM vertex of edge.
setShortestWay(int) - Method in class Vertex
Vertex's shortest way setter.
setTo(Vertex<T>) - Method in class Edge
Changes a TO vertex of edge.
setValue(T) - Method in class Vertex
Vertex's value setter.
setWeight(int) - Method in class Edge
Method for setting a weight.

V

Vertex<T> - Class in <Unnamed>
Class Vertex for storing vertexes in Graph.
Vertex(T) - Constructor for class Vertex
Constructor for vertex as its value, white(false) color, infinity the shortest way and list of incident edges.
vertexArray - Variable in class Graph
